## Process
### Functions
- `list_jobs(offset, limit, service)`: (no docstring)
- `create_job(payload, service)`: (no docstring)
- `get_job(job_id, service)`: (no docstring)
- `get_job_results(job_id, service)`: (no docstring)
- `create_schedule(schedule, service)`: Create a new job schedule.
- `list_schedules(offset, limit, service)`: List all schedules with pagination.
- `get_schedule(schedule_id, service)`: Get details of a specific schedule.
- `pause_schedule(schedule_id, service)`: Pause a schedule so it no longer triggers automatically.
- `resume_schedule(schedule_id, service)`: Resume a paused schedule.
- `delete_schedule(schedule_id, service)`: Permanently delete a schedule.
- `run_schedule_now(schedule_id, service)`: Trigger an immediate execution of a scheduled job outside its normal cadence.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
